nrqlQueries.query: SELECT average(flink.jvm.cpu.load) * 100 AS 'CPU Load %' FROM Metric WHERE instrumentation.provider = 'opentelemetry' FACET flink.taskmanager.id TIMESERIES AUTO
SELECT latest(flink.jvm.memory.heap.used) AS 'Used', latest(flink.jvm.memory.heap.max) AS 'Max' FROM Metric WHERE instrumentation.provider = 'opentelemetry' FACET flink.taskmanager.id TIMESERIES AUTO
SELECT rate(sum(flink.task.record.count), 1 minute) FROM Metric WHERE record = 'in' AND instrumentation.provider = 'opentelemetry' FACET flink.taskmanager.id TIMESERIES AUTO
SELECT sum(flink.jvm.gc.collections.time) FROM Metric WHERE instrumentation.provider = 'opentelemetry' FACET flink.taskmanager.id TIMESERIES AUTO

SELECT latest(flink.memory.managed.used) AS 'Used', latest(flink.memory.managed.total) AS 'Total' FROM Metric WHERE instrumentation.provider = 'opentelemetry' FACET flink.taskmanager.id TIMESERIES AUTO
